w3_boundary: 본 보고의 탐지기 사다리·모든 val-A/val-B 수치의 유효 범위는 CubiCasa SEG-IR 우주 한정이다. E1 실무 도면 전이는 미검증이다.

sample_rule.unit: every file with case-insensitive .png extension recursively below the dataset root
sample_rule.key: dataset-root-relative path with backslashes converted to forward slashes; original case retained
sample_rule.lexical_arm: take the first 300 keys in ordering
sample_rule.hash_arm: from keys not in the lexical arm, compute lowercase SHA-256 hex of the UTF-8 key; retain keys whose final hex nibble is one of 0,2,4,6,8,a,c,e; order by hash then key and take the first 300
sample_rule.shortfall_rule: do not replace unavailable candidates; use the resulting total below 600

measure: distinct labels observed in sampled annotations
deterministic SEG-IR projection for wall, opening, and other
label_schema.pass: A stable enumerated schema is locally evidenced; wall is an explicit class; opening, door, or window is explicit; wall and at least one opening class are observed in sampled annotations; and every declared class maps without ambiguity to exactly one of wall/opening/other.
label_schema.fail: Wall is absent, opening/door/window semantics are absent, or the declared/observed representation cannot be deterministically projected to wall/opening/other.
label_schema.inconclusive: Schema sources conflict, sampled annotation labels cannot be decoded, or declared labels cannot be reconciled with observed identifiers.

measure: validity of normalized or vector coordinates
mask-derived bounding box versus supplied box/vector envelope IoU
mask_alignment.paired_object: an annotated object with both a decodable nonempty raster mask and independently supplied bbox or vector-coordinate envelope
mask_alignment.aligned_object: mask-envelope IoU >= 0.90 and centroid distance <= 0.02 of image diagonal
mask_alignment.pass: At least 100 paired objects from at least 30 sampled drawings are evaluable; image/mask dimension agreement >= 99%; coordinate validity >= 99%; and aligned-object rate >= 95%.
mask_alignment.fail: With the minimum paired evidence available, dimension agreement < 95%, coordinate validity < 95%, aligned-object rate < 90%, or a consistent axis/scale/origin mismatch affects >= 10% of evaluable drawings.
mask_alignment.inconclusive: Paired evidence is below 100 objects or 30 drawings, or results lie only in the preregistered gray bands.

measure: dataset-supplied official split names and assignments
split_isolation.pass: At least two official named splits exist including train and a held-out val or test split; a stable project/drawing group identifier permits grouping; cross-split group overlap is zero; and cross-split exact-image duplicate overlap is zero.
split_isolation.fail: Only one split is supplied, no official per-sample split assignment exists, any project/drawing group crosses splits, or any exact PNG duplicate crosses splits.
split_isolation.inconclusive: Multiple official split assignments exist and exact duplicates are absent, but a stable project/drawing grouping key is unavailable or undecodable.

measure: union wall-mask pixel fraction per drawing
semantic_density.pass: At least 500 sampled drawings have decodable annotations and dimensions; wall-positive rate >= 90%; median wall pixel fraction is from 1% through 40%; at least 90% of drawings have wall fraction from 0.1% through 60%; and median wall-instance count >= 1.
semantic_density.fail: At least 100 drawings are evaluable and wall-positive rate < 75%, median wall pixel fraction < 0.5% or > 60%, or median wall-instance count is zero.
semantic_density.inconclusive: Fewer than 100 drawings are evaluable, required pixel masks/instances are unavailable, or results fall between PASS and FAIL criteria.

overall_rule.NOT_QUALIFIED: one or more axes FAIL; split isolation is a hard blocker
overall_rule.PARTIAL: no axis FAIL and one or more axes INCONCLUSIVE

unknown_policy: Preserve UNKNOWN and do not infer missing evidence.
